reasoning: The control 'CCCS CA-2: Control Assessments' focuses on ensuring that security assessments are conducted. In the Kubernetes context, this translates to ensuring that audit logging is enabled and properly configured to capture necessary metadata for assessment purposes. Additionally, admission controllers can be configured to enforce security policies, acting as a preventive measure to ensure compliance with security standards. These checks ensure that the Kubernetes environment is subject to continuous security assessments and policy enforcement, aligning with the intent of the control.
title: CCCS CA-2: Control Assessments
